title: oplismenus imbecillis
intro: Oplismenus imbecillis, also known as the weak false-brome or weak false brome, is a type of grass-like plant belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its ability to promote digestion and relieve various health issues. The health benefits of Oplismenus imbecillis include treating digestive problems, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
